chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications No.78 to 82 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.100 of 2013 2. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 M/s. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz & Muhammad Usman Alam, Advocates for the Applicant Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali, Advoate for the Respondent ************ Learned Counsel for the Applicant, under instructions, does not press these Income Tax Reference Applications. Accordingly, these Income Tax Reference Application are hereby dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Office to place a copy of this order in connected Reference Applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
